name: Scots Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and confectioner's sugar together.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Knead for 10 minutes.
4. Pat dough into a 1/4-inch thick rectangle (14 by 12 inches) on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Cut into 2-inch diamonds or squares.
6. Bake at 300°F for 45 minutes, or until golden.
7. Recut the cookies at the marks and separate carefully while still warm.
